a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Mountain Green Cover Index measures the share of mountainous areas covered by either forest, cropland,
grassland or wetland. An increase in green mountain cover may reflect either the expansion of natural
ecosystems or an increase in the growth of vegetation in areas previously covered by glaciers.
Data source: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
